comments: Chick's heard when parents returned to nest
Two parents coming to and from a nest. Chick's heard and estimated at 2 although there's probably more.

Had a conversation with some locals about how the swan pair is late in laying their eggs, the female was off the nest at the time and no eggs were present. 5 minutes later she stands up on the nest and I managed to see 5 eggs. Didn't expect to witness the eggs being laid today!
